replies.msg:
今日佛誕無乜嘢做，打打吓Far Cry 5 又有少少悶。

忽然諗起早兩日睇到個post:

https://www.pcgamer.com/10-years-later-we-can-finally-run-crysis/

條友用8700k 配單張1080 ti, 開2007 年出的Crysis @4k max with 4xAA, 佢話無單張gpu 推得到4k 8xAA (應該唔包Titan X)

於是即時用$160買隻Crysis 試試佢：

replies.msg:
睇開我亂買嘢的巴打應該都知我部機的spec:

7820x 加兩張1080 ti

一入遊戲，當然就係乜都推盡佢

仆你個街，fps lock 實得24fps?

即刻上google 查吓乜事，原來bug嚟

只要解像高過1920x1080開v sync 就會lock咗得24fps


in DX10/11 at 1080 you will get 24 fps with HDMI and 50 fps with DVI if you use vsync. funny how they keep trying to improve the visuals yet their sorry asses cant even fix this problem.

replies.msg:
禁多幾次alt+enter

話時話依家呢隻game食single core cpu

咁當然要試吓唔同的workaround

1. 唔開v sync

效果：畫面撕裂都玩得落不如玩返PS3算

2. 入 Nvidia Control panel 開 adaptive v sync

效果：同 in game 開 v sync 一樣 得24fps

3. 入 Nvidia Control panel 開 fast sync

效果：算係比較有效的方法，但見到左上角個數字周時跌到48，非常不爽

結果俾我搵到一個最正的方法：

https://youtu.be/yPq4Jxw6sko

入nvidia control panel 自製一個3832x2160的解像

效果： 成功lock 住60fps 而又無撕裂

quote.msg:

replies.msg: 禁幾次right alt+enter啦，佢會轉個hz，睇下係咪60fps就得

以兩張1080ti 總算可以推到Crysis 8xAA max @4k

兩張display card 保持住50-60% 使用率

知道就嚟有得賣4k 144hz 的mon, 特登試吓uncap咗fps會點

關咗AA 情況下可以run 到90-110 的fps，但同時兩張1080 ti都full load 100% ,可憐我張無上到水的2 號咭直衝上84度 （唔full load 74度左右）

replies.msg: 隻game咁就10年，畫面仲ok嗎

小小感受：

無諗過2007年的遊戲喺2018 年攞出嚟試都仲好靚

而且亦估唔到會咁demanding

不過其實上到4k 開8xAA 某程度只係晒電同自我感覺良好，實際無乜分

同時都覺得如果要玩4k 144 mon,就算隻game 用到sli,兩張1080 ti 都唔係咁夠， crysis呢隻嘢用兩張ti 推都好似過唔到120fps,而且咁full load兩張咭都唔係辦法

有無巴打有相似的遊戲可以用嚟試吓機？

忽然記起佢：

Deus Ex: Mankind Divided

Developer: Eidos Montréal
Game Engine: Dawn Engine
Release Date: August 23, 2016
Minimum FPS: 2.6
Maximum FPS: 8.7
Average FPS: 6.1

A lot of the games on our list will make the beefiest gaming PCs sweat, but running Deus Ex: Mankind Divided’s benchmark maxed out at 4K will make them cry. It’s important to note that the benchmark seems particularly brutal, and perhaps represents a worst-case scenario for the game. Regardless, it was the most graphically demanding game that we tested by a country mile with our system getting a 6.1 FPS average, which made it look like a slideshow. Its maximum frame rate only managed to hit 8.7, which is crazy low given what we have under the hood of our rig.

https://www.gamespot.com/gallery/the-most-graphically-demanding-pc-games/2900-1331/

Summary

But Can It Run Crysis is a phrase referring to the 2007 Crytek first-person shooter Crysis, laminating the reputation the game has obtained for it’s steep system requirements at the time of it’s release. The phrase has slowly evolved into a snowclone as years pass, substituting “But can it run X?” for the most recent and system demanding title at the time.

https://www.google.com.hk/search?q=can+it+run+crysis&rlz=1CDGOYI_enHK792HK792&oq=can+it+run+crysis&aqs=chrome.0.69i59j69i60j0l2.5582j1j9&hl=zh-TW&sourceid=chrome-mobile&ie=UTF-8
